title: Tron Legacy spoiler alert similarity to EoE
display_title: Tron Legacy spoiler alert similarity to EoE
wikitext:
[]: Tron Legacy (spoiler alert) similarity to EoE             Quote Post by nomis1242 » Sun Jan 16, 2011 5:20 am The bit in Tron Legacy where Sam Flynn and co reach the portal to get back to the real world reminded me of EoE: Flynn absorbs Clu (ala the creation of GNR) and then everyone gets (digitally) tanged. Did anyone else notice this?

[]:             Quote Post by Galaxy News Reidio » Sun Jan 16, 2011 6:33 am Not very much. Humans (or whatever) ascending to "the next level" is quite a common trope.

[]:             Quote Post by The Forgotten Knight » Sun Jan 16, 2011 11:45 am I don't see it.

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Mon Jan 17, 2011 12:48 am The Forgotten Knight wrote: I don't see it.

[]:             Quote Post by KLVTZ » Mon Jan 17, 2011 2:51 am i see a slight similarity, but nothing to substantial....

[]:             Quote Post by The Forgotten Knight » Mon Jan 17, 2011 11:24 pm Ironfoot wrote: Rei merging with Lilith/Flynn merging with Clu. The distinction is too small and stretched out to be taken seriously.

[]:             Quote Post by nomis1242 » Tue Jan 18, 2011 12:38 am @everyone: yeah there are heaps of differences (I'm not implying it's a copy or anything). But somehow it reminded me of EoE anyway, was just wondering if it reminded anyone else.

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Tue Jan 18, 2011 12:50 am The Forgotten Knight wrote: Yeah but didn't that kill Flynn? Whereas Rei was Lilith, not a virtual copy.

[]:             Quote Post by Combs » Tue Jan 18, 2011 12:50 am [URL=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Transhumanism]Relevant to your question, though I can't find the appropriate TvTropes article.[/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by ShadowGT » Tue Jan 18, 2011 1:00 am was flynn covered in vagina's when it happened?

[]:             Quote Post by SenorSquiid » Wed Jan 19, 2011 2:19 pm I thought it was more similar to the end of Star Trel: The Motion Picture aka the best Star Trek movie.

[]:             Quote Post by chaosakita » Thu Jan 20, 2011 3:52 am Well duh, it obviously had to be based off of EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Jan 20, 2011 10:20 am Obligatory:

[]:             Quote Post by BiQ » Fri Jan 28, 2011 6:55 pm If you want to see things, you will. Doesn't mean they are true, however... Case in point: I held off from actually reading this thread until I actually saw tron legacy (which happened just few hours ago) but this thread topic made me look for similarities... And then I couldn't help but see daddy issues -> Flynn = Gendo (tries to make some kind of utopia without caring too much about humanitys current state in the process, although Gendo's goals did not necessarily include anything else but reuniting with Yui), Sam = Shinji (Sam has gripes about daddy leaving him, even if he has spine where Shinji doesn't) , Quorra = Rei (she's something not exactly human, considers Flynn as her highest authority, etc) ... but then I just woke up and ditched all of this. Just too much fanwank to be taken seriously.

[]:             Quote Post by nomis1242 » Sat Jan 29, 2011 6:14 pm ^ fanwank is fun! Hope it didn't make you enjoy the Tron film less, though.

[]:             Quote Post by Dark doom » Sun Jan 30, 2011 2:31 pm I see where your comming from. But the connection is no stronger than the time some hobo came along a sujested that Optimus primes last stand in TRotF was simmiler to Asukas last stand in EoE. It's just to broad a statment.
